description: The 4StoreyBuilding model is loaded in eQUEST. An architect has proposed adding a central atrium skylight to the top floor to improve daylighting. Add a 20 ft by 20 ft skylight to the roof of the Top Floor Core zone (T.C35) using 'Gt 1 (Dbl Clr Air)' glass, positioned with an X-offset of 15 ft and a Y-offset of 15 ft. Run the annual DOE-2.2 simulation and save the project.
